ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Prefix of the feature, indicating its type (e.g., time, syntactic) */,
  "chi2" REAL /* Chi-squared value of the feature */,
  "pval" REAL /* P-value of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Specific type of the feature */,
  "feature_importance" REAL /* Score indicating the importance of the feature */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source from which the feature is derived */,
  "feature_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature was created */,
  "feature_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_prefix FOREIGN KEY ("prefix") REFERENCES feature_categories ("prefix")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature category */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Prefix of the feature category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature category */,
  "category_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "category_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the interaction */,
  "system_utterance" TEXT /* System's response or utterance */,
  "user_utterance" TEXT /* User's response or utterance */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the interaction, such as the session or conversation ID */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session or conversation */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., chat, voice call) */,
  "interaction_context" TEXT /* Additional context information (e.g., location, device) */,
  "interaction_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction was created */,
  "interaction_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
